title: -O3 isn't passed down to C++ compiler
body:
Command:
```
verilator --binary -O3 test.v
```

Output printed to terminal:
```
make: Entering directory '/home/redacted/temp/verilator_bug/obj_dir'
ccache g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/home/redacted/repos/verilator/include -I/home/redacted/repos/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TIMING=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable    -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT   -c -o verilated.o /home/redacted/repos/verilator/include/verilated.cpp
ccache g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/home/redacted/repos/verilator/include -I/home/redacted/repos/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TIMING=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable    -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT   -c -o verilated_threads.o /home/redacted/repos/verilator/include/verilated_threads.cpp
python3 /home/redacted/repos/verilator/bin/verilator_includer -DVL_INCLUDE_OPT=include Vtest.cpp Vtest___024root__DepSet_h9b2d61ff__0.cpp Vtest___024root__DepSet_hc07518e4__0.cpp Vtest__main.cpp Vtest___024root__Slow.cpp Vtest___024root__DepSet_hc07518e4__0__Slow.cpp Vtest__Syms.cpp > Vtest__ALL.cpp
ccache g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/home/redacted/repos/verilator/include -I/home/redacted/repos/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TIMING=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable    -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT   -c -o Vtest__ALL.o Vtest__ALL.cpp
echo "" > Vtest__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
g++ -fuse-ld=mold   verilated.o verilated_threads.o Vtest__ALL.a    -pthread -lpthread -latomic   -o Vtest
rm Vtest__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
make: Leaving directory '/home/redacted/temp/verilator_bug/obj_dir'
- V e r i l a t i o n   R e p o r t: Verilator 5.033 devel rev v5.032-37-g20faa9946
- Verilator: Built from 0.022 MB sources in 2 modules, into 0.018 MB in 7 C++ files needing 0.000 MB
- Verilator: Walltime 0.085 s (elab=0.000, cvt=0.001, bld=0.081); cpu 0.004 s on 1 threads; alloced 7.914 MB
```

The output shows that the optimization flag being passed to the C++ compiler is `-Os`, not `-O3`.

Verilator version: Verilator 5.033 devel rev v5.032-37-g20faa9946

OS: Fedora 40


... test.v:
```
module Test;

    wire clk;
    reg x;

    always @(posedge clk) x <= ~x;

endmodule
```
